message.content: ENCONTRE ARQUIVOS DUPLICADOS E ME AJUDE A DECIDIR QUAIS MANTER

content.thinking:
O usuÃĄrio quer encontrar arquivos duplicados e ajuda para decidir quais manter. Vou usar o agente Explore para explorar o sistema de arquivos e encontrar arquivos duplicados.

Primeiro, preciso entender o escopo - o usuÃĄrio estÃĄ no diretÃģrio C:\Users\User. Vou usar um agente para encontrar arquivos duplicados neste diretÃģrio.

content.text: Vou explorar seu diretÃģrio para encontrar arquivos duplicados. Isso envolve comparar arquivos por nome, tamanho e conteÃšdo.

input.prompt:
Find duplicate files in the user's home directory C:\Users\User. Look for:

1. Files with the same name in different locations
2. Files with the same size that might be duplicates
3. Common duplicate patterns like:
   - Downloads folder duplicates (file(1).pdf, file(2).pdf, etc.)
   - Documents that might have been copied multiple times
   - Media files (images, videos) that appear in multiple folders
   - Desktop duplicates

Focus on these common user folders:
- Desktop
- Downloads
- Documents
- Pictures
- Videos
- Music

List the potential duplicates found, grouped by type, showing:
- File paths
- File sizes
- Modification dates if possible

Be thorough but focus on actual user files, not system files.

Find duplicate files in the user's home directory C:\Users\User. Look for:

1. Files with the same name in different locations
2. Files with the same size that might be duplicates
3. Common duplicate patterns like:

content.text: Agora vou analisar e gerar o relatÃģrio. Primeiro, arquivos com **nomes idÃŠnticos** em pastas diferentes.

input.command:
powershell -NoProfile -Command '
$scratchpad = "C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Temp\claude\C--Users-User\462f22f1-d72c-4df7-98f6-24b50012daf6\scratchpad"
$arquivos = Import-Csv "$scratchpad\superendividamento_audit.csv"

# Agrupar por nome e encontrar duplicados
$duplicados = $arquivos | Group-Object Name | Where-Object { $_.Count -gt 1 } | Sort-Object Count -Descending

$report = @()
$report += "=" * 100
$report += "RELATÃRIO DE AUDITORIA - SUPERENDIVIDAMENTO"
$report += "Data: $(Get-Date -Format ''dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'')"
$report += "Total de arquivos analisados: $($arquivos.Count)"
$report += "=" * 100
$report += ""
$report += "SEÃÃO 1: ARQUIVOS COM NOMES IDÃNTICOS EM PASTAS/CLIENTES DIFERENTES"
$report += "-" * 100
$report += "Total de nomes duplicados encontrados: $($duplicados.Count)"
$report += ""

foreach ($grupo in $duplicados | Select-Object -First 100) {
    $report += ">>> ARQUIVO: $($grupo.Name) [Aparece $($grupo.Count) vezes]"
    $report += ""
    foreach ($arq in $grupo.Group | Sort-Object Cliente) {
        $tamanho = if ($arq.Length) { "{0:N1} KB" -f ([double]$arq.Length/1KB) } else { "N/A" }
        $data = if ($arq.LastWriteTime) { $arq.LastWriteTime } else { "N/A" }
        $report += "    Cliente: $($arq.Cliente)"
        $report += "    SubPasta: $($arq.SubPasta)"
        $report += "    Tamanho: $tamanho"
        $report += "    Data ModificaÃ§ÃĢo: $data"
        $report += "    ---"
    }
    $report += ""
}

$report -join "`n" | Out-File "$scratchpad\relatorio_duplicados_identicos.txt" -Encoding UTF8
Write-Host "RelatÃģrio de duplicados idÃŠnticos salvo. Total: $($duplicados.Count) nomes duplicados"
'

content.thinking: O relatÃģrio foi gerado, mas houve um erro na formataÃ§ÃĢo da data (problema de aspas). Mas o importante ÃĐ que temos 110 nomes de arquivos duplicados. Agora vou gerar o segundo relatÃģrio para arquivos com sufixos (1), (2), (3) ou CÃģpia.

input.command:
powershell -NoProfile -Command '
$scratchpad = "C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Temp\claude\C--Users-User\462f22f1-d72c-4df7-98f6-24b50012daf6\scratchpad"
$arquivos = Import-Csv "$scratchpad\superendividamento_audit.csv"

# Filtrar arquivos com sufixos de cÃģpia
$copias = $arquivos | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "\(1\)|\(2\)|\(3\)|\(4\)|\(5\)|C[oÃģ]pia|copia" } | Sort-Object Cliente, Name

$report = @()
$report += ""
$report += "=" * 100
$report += "SEÃÃO 2: ARQUIVOS COM SUFIXOS DE CÃPIA - (1), (2), (3), CÃģpia, etc."
$report += "-" * 100
$report += "Total de arquivos com sufixo de cÃģpia: $($copias.Count)"
$report += ""

$clienteAtual = ""
foreach ($arq in $copias) {
    if ($arq.Cliente -ne $clienteAtual) {
        $clienteAtual = $arq.Cliente
        $report += ""
        $report += "### CLIENTE: $clienteAtual ###"
        $report += "-" * 50
    }
    $tamanho = if ($arq.Length) { "{0:N1} KB" -f ([double]$arq.Length/1KB) } else { "N/A" }
    $data = if ($arq.LastWriteTime) { $arq.LastWriteTime } else { "N/A" }
    $subpasta = if ($arq.SubPasta) { $arq.SubPasta } else { "(raiz do cliente)" }
    $report += "  Arquivo: $($arq.Name)"
    $report += "  SubPasta: $subpasta"
    $report += "  Tamanho: $tamanho | Data: $data"
    $report += ""
}

$report -join "`n" | Out-File "$scratchpad\relatorio_copias.txt" -Encoding UTF8
Write-Host "RelatÃģrio de cÃģpias salvo. Total: $($copias.Count) arquivos"
'

input.command:
powershell -NoProfile -Command '
Write-Host "=========================================="
Write-Host "MEMÃRIA RAM"
Write-Host "=========================================="
$ram = Get-CimInstance Win32_PhysicalMemory | Measure-Object Capacity -Sum
$totalGB = [math]::Round($ram.Sum/1GB, 1)
$os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem
$usadaGB = [math]::Round(($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize - $os.FreePhysicalMemory)/1MB, 1)
$livreGB = [math]::Round($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB, 1)
$percentual = [math]::Round(($usadaGB/$totalGB)*100, 0)
Write-Host "Total: $totalGB GB"
Write-Host "Em uso: $usadaGB GB ($percentual%)"
Write-Host "Livre: $livreGB GB"
'

powershell -NoProfile -Command '
Write-Host "=========================================="
Write-Host "PLACA DE VÃDEO"
Write-Host "=========================================="
Get-CimInstance Win32_VideoController | ForEach-Object {
    Write-Host "Nome: $($_.Name)"
    Write-Host "Driver: $($_.DriverVersion)"
    $vramGB = [math]::Round($_.AdapterRAM/1GB, 1)
    if ($vramGB -gt 0) { Write-Host "VRAM: $vramGB GB" }
    Write-Host ""
}
'

powershell -NoProfile -Command '
Write-Host "=========================================="
Write-Host "ESPAÃO EM DISCO"
Write-Host "=========================================="
Get-PSDrive -PSProvider FileSystem | Where-Object { $_.Used -gt 0 } | ForEach-Object {
    $totalGB = [math]::Round(($_.Used + $_.Free)/1GB, 1)
    $usadoGB = [math]::Round($_.Used/1GB, 1)
    $livreGB = [math]::Round($_.Free/1GB, 1)
    $percent = [math]::Round(($_.Used/($_.Used + $_.Free))*100, 0)
    Write-Host "Drive $($_.Name): | Total: $totalGB GB | Usado: $usadoGB GB ($percent%) | Livre: $livreGB GB"
}
'

powershell -NoProfile -Command '

$cpu = Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor

content.thinking:
Agora vou executar comandos para limpar cache de memÃģria. Existem algumas tÃĐcnicas:
1. Limpar working sets dos processos
2. Limpar standby list (requer ferramenta externa ou RAMMap)
3. Limpar cache do sistema

Vou usar o mÃĐtodo nativo do PowerShell para limpar working sets.

input.command:
powershell -NoProfile -Command '
Write-Host "=========================================="
Write-Host "LIMPANDO CACHE DE MEMÃRIA..."
Write-Host "=========================================="

# 1. Limpar Working Set de processos nÃĢo essenciais
Write-Host "1. Reduzindo memÃģria de processos inativos..."
$processos = Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.WorkingSet64 -gt 50MB -and $_.ProcessName -notin @("System","smss","csrss","wininit","services","lsass","svchost") }
foreach ($p in $processos) {
    try {
        [System.Diagnostics.Process]::GetProcessById($p.Id).MinWorkingSet = 1MB
    } catch {}
}

# 2. ForÃ§ar coleta de lixo do .NET
Write-Host "2. Executando garbage collection..."
[System.GC]::Collect()
[System.GC]::WaitForPendingFinalizers()
[System.GC]::Collect()

# 3. Limpar clipboard
Write-Host "3. Limpando clipboard..."
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms
[System.Windows.Forms.Clipboard]::Clear()

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Limpeza bÃĄsica concluÃ­da!"
'

input.command:
powershell -NoProfile -Command '
Write-Host "=========================================="
Write-Host "PROGRAMAS INSTALADOS - POR TAMANHO"
Write-Host "=========================================="
Get-ItemProperty HKLM:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*, HKLM:\Software\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | 
Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -and $_.EstimatedSize } |
Select-Object DisplayName, @{N="TamanhoMB";E={[math]::Round($_.EstimatedSize/1024,0)}}, Publisher, InstallDate |
Sort-Object TamanhoMB -Descending |
Select-Object -First 40 |
ForEach-Object {
    Write-Host ("{0,-50} {1,6} MB" -f $_.DisplayName.Substring(0, [Math]::Min(50, $_.DisplayName.Length)), $_.TamanhoMB)
}
'

input.command:
powershell -NoProfile -Command '
Write-Host "=========================================="

$dockerPath = "HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run"
Remove-ItemProperty -Path $dockerPath -Name "Docker Desktop" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
# TambÃĐm desativar via Task Manager startup

Remove-Item "$startupFolder\Docker Desktop.lnk" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

Based on the search results, here's what I found about Google Meet's maximum video resolution:

## Maximum Resolution Limits

Google Meet isn't capable of providing 4K or even 2K quality of video calls. Google Meet currently only supports video resolution up to 1080p, which is accessible on the web when you use a PC or Mac with a 1080p camera.

## 1080p Availability and Conditions

Google announced 1080p video resolution for 1:1 Google Meet calls earlier in 2023, then expanded 1080p to meetings with three or more participants. This higher resolution is available on the web when using computers with enough computing power and a 1080p camera.

1080p resolution is off by default and requires the user to opt-in via the settings menu. Note that 1080p is only sent when recording is enabled or when one or more users have pinned the 1080p-enabled user on a screen large enough to render the 1080p video feed. In those specific scenarios, additional bandwidth will be required to send 1080p video, and Meet will automatically adjust the resolution if the device is bandwidth constrained.

## Recording Resolution (June 2024 Update)

For recorded meetings in Google Meet, Google increased the maximum resolution for the speaker's video feed from 720p to 1080p. Meet already supports 1080p recordings for presented content â together, these enhancements increase viewing quality of meeting recordings.

## Plan Availability

1080p is available to Google Workspace Business Standard, Business Plus, Enterprise Essentials, Enterprise Standard, Enterprise Starter, Enterprise Plus, Education Plus, and the Teaching and Learning Upgrade, and Workspace Individual subscribers. Also available to Google One subscribers with 2TB or more storage space with eligible devices. Not available to users with personal Google Accounts.

## Summary
- **Maximum sending resolution**: 1080p (Full HD)
- **Maximum receiving resolution**: 1080p
- **Default resolution**: 720p (1080p must be manually enabled)
- **4K support**: Not available

input.command:
powershell -NoProfile -Command '
Write-Host "=========================================="
Write-Host "DESINSTALANDO ONEDRIVE"
Write-Host "=========================================="

# Parar processos do OneDrive
Write-Host "Parando OneDrive..."
Stop-Process -Name "OneDrive" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Start-Sleep -Seconds 2

# Desinstalar OneDrive
$onedrivePath = "$env:SystemRoot\System32\OneDriveSetup.exe"
if (Test-Path $onedrivePath) {
    Write-Host "Executando desinstalador..."
    Start-Process $onedrivePath -ArgumentList "/uninstall" -Wait -NoNewWindow
    Write-Host "â OneDrive desinstalado!"
} else {
    # Tentar via SysWOW64
    $onedrivePath2 = "$env:SystemRoot\SysWOW64\OneDriveSetup.exe"
    if (Test-Path $onedrivePath2) {
        Start-Process $onedrivePath2 -ArgumentList "/uninstall" -Wait -NoNewWindow
        Write-Host "â OneDrive desinstalado!"
    } else {
        Write-Host "Tentando via Painel de Controle..."
    }
}

# Remover da inicializaÃ§ÃĢo
Remove-ItemProperty -Path "HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run" -Name "OneDrive" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Write-Host "â Removido da inicializaÃ§ÃĢo"
'

input.command:
powershell -NoProfile -Command '
Write-Host "=========================================="
Write-Host "MICROSOFT .NET - BUSCA AMPLIADA"
Write-Host "=========================================="
Get-ItemProperty HKLM:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*, HKLM:\Software\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | 
Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -like "*Microsoft .NET*" -or $_.DisplayName -like "*Microsoft Windows Desktop*" -or $_.DisplayName -like "*.NET Runtime*" -or $_.DisplayName -like "*.NET Host*" -or $_.DisplayName -like "*.NET SDK*" } |
Select-Object DisplayName, DisplayVersion, @{N="MB";E={[math]::Round($_.EstimatedSize/1024,0)}} |
Sort-Object DisplayName |
ForEach-Object {
    Write-Host "$($_.DisplayName) | $($_.MB) MB"
}
'

powershell -NoProfile -Command '
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "=========================================="
Write-Host "WINDOWS SDK COMPLETO"
Write-Host "=========================================="

ForEach-Object {

}
'

input.command:
powershell -NoProfile -Command '
Write-Host "=========================================="
Write-Host "VERIFICAÃÃO COMPLETA DO SISTEMA"
Write-Host "=========================================="

# Disco
$c = Get-PSDrive C
$livreGB = [math]::Round($c.Free/1GB, 1)
$usadoGB = [math]::Round($c.Used/1GB, 1)
$totalGB = [math]::Round(($c.Free + $c.Used)/1GB, 1)
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "DISCO C:"
Write-Host "  Total: $totalGB GB"
Write-Host "  Usado: $usadoGB GB"
Write-Host "  Livre: $livreGB GB"

# MemÃģria
$os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem
$ramTotal = [math]::Round($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize/1MB, 1)
$ramLivre = [math]::Round($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB, 2)
$ramUsada = [math]::Round(($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize - $os.FreePhysicalMemory)/1MB, 2)
$ramPercent = [math]::Round((($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize - $os.FreePhysicalMemory)/$os.TotalVisibleMemorySize)*100, 0)
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "MEMÃRIA RAM:"
Write-Host "  Total: $ramTotal GB"
Write-Host "  Em uso: $ramUsada GB ($ramPercent%)"
Write-Host "  Livre: $ramLivre GB"
'

content.text: Vou executar todas as aÃ§Ãĩes de uma vez.

input.command:
powershell -NoProfile -Command '
Write-Host "=========================================="
Write-Host "1/4 - REMOVENDO WINDOWS SDK"
Write-Host "=========================================="

$sdk = Get-ItemProperty HKLM:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*, HKLM:\Software\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | 
Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -like "*Windows SDK*" -or $_.DisplayName -like "*WinRT Intellisense*" -or $_.DisplayName -like "*Universal CRT*" }

$count = 0
foreach ($item in $sdk) {
    if ($item.UninstallString -like "*MsiExec*") {
        $guid = $item.PSChildName
        Write-Host "Removendo: $($item.DisplayName)..."
        Start-Process "msiexec.exe" -ArgumentList "/X$guid /quiet /norestart" -Wait -NoNewWindow -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
        $count++
    }
}
Write-Host "â $count itens do SDK processados"
'

input.command:
powershell -NoProfile -Command '
Write-Host "=========================================="
Write-Host "2/4 - REMOVENDO .NET VERSÃES ANTIGAS"
Write-Host "=========================================="

# Remover .NET 6.0 e versÃĩes anteriores do 8.0
$dotnetOld = Get-ItemProperty HKLM:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*, HKLM:\Software\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | 
Where-Object { 
    ($_.DisplayName -like "*\.NET*6.0*" -or 
     $_.DisplayName -like "*\.NET*8.0.12*" -or 
     $_.DisplayName -like "*\.NET*8.0.14*" -or
     $_.DisplayName -like "*\.NET*5.0*") -and
    $_.DisplayName -notlike "*8.0.20*"
}

$count = 0
foreach ($item in $dotnetOld) {
    if ($item.UninstallString) {
        $guid = $item.PSChildName
        Write-Host "Removendo: $($item.DisplayName)..."
        Start-Process "msiexec.exe" -ArgumentList "/X$guid /quiet /norestart" -Wait -NoNewWindow -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
        $count++
    }
}
Write-Host "â $count itens .NET antigos processados"
'
